text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One morning, as I'm heading to the<n>track to do
training preparations...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Didn't get much<n>sleep?
You're the one who asked me<n>to train with you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I was up all night reading<n>fan letters.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, fan letters, huh? Did you get<n>anything out of
them?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...No. In fact, they left me feeling<n>puzzled.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I know fans are important and I really<n>appreciate
their support...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I'm not sure what I can do in<n>return...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I see... Let me ask you something,<n>Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Did any of the letters actually ask you<n>to do
something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... Well, I'm not sure exactly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I think you'd better take another,<n>closer look at
them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you'll get it then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, okay. I'll pay closer attention tothem. Thanks... Yawn.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Please do, but also make sure you<n>get enough
sleep. Your fans will be<n>disappointed if they see
you looking<n>sloppy.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she sees Silence Suzuka stifle<n>another yawn,
a gentle smile spreads<n>across Air Groove's
face.
